primary_trust_signals: Licensed, Bonded & Insured (state contractor license number shown above nav)
Google reviews rating displayed as star rating with count
BBB badge in trust bar (monochrome, above nav)
Before/after project photos (visual proof beats all other trust signals for visual buyers)
Owner photo with first name and years of experience
secondary_trust_signals: Process steps (removes uncertainty about what happens next)
Written privacy line on the form
trust_bar_pattern: thin strip ABOVE nav: license left, phone center (clickable), BBB badge right
badge_placement: trust bar above nav + trust-bar-inline section (position 2 on homepage)

niche_badges.label: ISA Certified Arborist
niche_badges.collect_from: client's ISA credential page or certificate
niche_badges.condition: only if tree care service is offered

niche_badges.label: Licensed Irrigation Contractor
niche_badges.collect_from: client provides license number; badge generated in-template
niche_badges.condition: only if irrigation service is offered

niche_badges.label: BBB Accredited
niche_badges.collect_from: client's BBB profile URL -- Stage 4 scrapes badge image
niche_badges.condition: only if client holds active BBB accreditation

niche_badges.label: Google Guaranteed
niche_badges.full_name: Google Local Services Ads background-check badge
niche_badges.condition: only if client runs Google Local Services Ads

niche_badges.label: Angi Verified
niche_badges.condition: optional; low conversion lift for landscaping niche

badge_collect_note: Stage 4 (asset-scraper agent) attempts to harvest badge images from the client's existing website, GBP, and linked profiles. If a badge is listed above as required (priority high) but cannot be harvested, Stage 4 flags it as missing and the trust-bar-inline section hides that slot rather than showing a broken image.
conversion_note: Portfolio/gallery is the primary trust driver for landscaping. Visual buyers need proof before pitch. Portfolio is placed at position 4 (before why-choose and reviews), immediately after services so prospects can verify capability.
